# GovHub

> AI proposal writing platform built for government contractors. Drafts, reviews, and formats federal, state, and local RFP responses with awareness of Section L/M structure, FAR/DFARS clauses, and Section 508 conformance.

## Product

- [AI proposal generator](https://govhub-marketing.pages.dev/solutions/ai-proposal-generator/): Drafts government RFP responses from the solicitation and your knowledge base.
- [Form autofiller](https://govhub-marketing.pages.dev/solutions/form-autofiller/): SF-33, SF-1449, reps & certs, and small-business representations autofilled from a shared company profile.
- [Template generator](https://govhub-marketing.pages.dev/solutions/template-generator/): Turns any solicitation into a compliant response outline with a compliance matrix and page-limit budget.
- [Technical writer review](https://govhub-marketing.pages.dev/solutions/technical-writer-review/): Automated review for compliance drift, evaluation-criteria alignment, and page-limit adherence.
- [Pricing](https://govhub-marketing.pages.dev/pricing/): Plans for solo contractors, small businesses, and system integrators.

## For

- [Small business contractors](https://govhub-marketing.pages.dev/for/small-business-contractors/): Win federal work without hiring a proposal team.
- [System integrators](https://govhub-marketing.pages.dev/for/system-integrators/): Coordinate multi-team pursuits without losing days to formatting.

## Compare

- [GovHub vs Loopio](https://govhub-marketing.pages.dev/vs/loopio/)
- [GovHub vs Responsive](https://govhub-marketing.pages.dev/vs/responsive/)
- [GovHub and Deltek GovWin IQ (different tools, often used together)](https://govhub-marketing.pages.dev/vs/govwin-iq/)

- [The complete guide to government proposal writing](https://govhub-marketing.pages.dev/blog/government-proposal-writing-guide/)
